{{Infobox character
| name = Helethshan
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] is an [[Archlord]] [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] is a member of the [[dragon]] family.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] uses a [[Burning Cloak]] to power his movements.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] uses [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
